## Severity
<!-- Select the severity level -->
- [ ] **Critical** - System crash or complete feature failure
- [ ] **High** - Major feature broken or significant data loss
- [ ] **Medium** - Feature partially broken or workaround available
- [ ] **Low** - Minor issue, cosmetic, or rare edge case

### Debug Information
To help diagnose, provide:
1. Browser console errors (F12 → Console tab)
2. Server logs from Docker container
3. Network tab information (F12 → Network tab)
